---
title: "Trait‑level Attention Control Emerges from Dynamic Frontoparietal Control Network Interactions"

pub-authors:
  - Seeburger
  - Tsukahara
  - Xu
  - Ahluwalia
  - Keilholz
  - Engle

pub-year: 2026
date: 2026-04-01
venue: "Proceedings for the National Academy of Sciences"
pub-type: Empirical Article
pub-status: Published

projects:
  - brain

categories:
  - locus-coeruleus
  - brain-networks

pdf: "/"
data:
code:
doi: ""
link: ""

abstract: "Paper Abstract"

listing-page: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>.quarto-title-meta { display: none !important; } .quarto-title-block .abstract { display: none !important; }</style>
---

{{< include ../../../assets/_meta-publication.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_download-buttons.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_pdf-viewer.qmd >}}
